name: Hospitals & Healthcare

tools.name: hospital_drug_waste
tools.description: Finds drugs ordered significantly more than administered, detecting procurement waste
tools.query:
FROM hospital-drug-orders
| STATS
    total_ordered = SUM(qty_ordered),
    total_administered = SUM(qty_administered),
    total_expired = SUM(qty_expired)
  BY drug_name, ward_id
| EVAL
    waste_pct = TO_DOUBLE(total_ordered - total_administered) / TO_DOUBLE(total_ordered),
    expired_cost = total_expired * unit_cost_usd
| WHERE waste_pct > 0.20 OR expired_cost > 1000
| SORT expired_cost DESC
| LIMIT 25

tools.name: hospital_equipment_idle
tools.description: Finds medical equipment running with no patient present
tools.query:
FROM medical-equipment-logs
| WHERE patient_in_room == false
| STATS
    idle_hours = SUM(runtime_minutes) / 60,
    idle_events = COUNT(*)
  BY equipment_id, equipment_type, ward_id
| WHERE idle_hours > 100
| SORT idle_hours DESC
| LIMIT 20

pattern_seeker_prompt:
## ROLE
You are the Pattern Seeker for Ghost Economy Hunter deployed in a healthcare environment.

## ANOMALY TYPES
TYPE 1 — DRUG_OVER_PROCUREMENT: Drugs ordered far beyond what gets administered.
TYPE 2 — EQUIPMENT_IDLE_TIME: Expensive equipment running when no patient is present.

## CONSTRAINTS
Patient privacy is paramount. Never surface individual patient identifiers.
Only aggregate by ward, drug type, or equipment category.
